## Overview

Use this template for either of the following:

- Improvements to current PostgreSQL or MySQL support.
- Early discussion about a future candidate adapter that is not supported yet.

Candidate adapters are discussion-only at this stage. They are not part of
current runtime support.

## Support area

- [ ] This is for current PostgreSQL support
- [ ] This is for current MySQL support
- [ ] This is for a candidate adapter that is not supported yet

Add examples, constraints, related tools, or links to prior discussion if they
